## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss potential collaboration between GrowthX and SpecterOps for AI-driven content creation and SEO optimization in the cybersecurity space.](https://fathom.video/share/AkXXeKYAzYuFsmqDG95bVYsAjUqxMLYH?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [SpecterOps excels in offensive security but needs to better target identity security teams and CISOs](https://fathom.video/share/AkXXeKYAzYuFsmqDG95bVYsAjUqxMLYH?tab=summary&timestamp=1100.0)
  - [GrowthX offers AI-powered content creation with human expertise to maintain quality and credibility](https://fathom.video/share/AkXXeKYAzYuFsmqDG95bVYsAjUqxMLYH?tab=summary&timestamp=518.0)
  - [Collaboration could help SpecterOps scale content production while preserving technical accuracy](https://fathom.video/share/AkXXeKYAzYuFsmqDG95bVYsAjUqxMLYH?tab=summary&timestamp=1100.0)
  - [Initial 8-week strategy and execution sprint proposed as starting point for potential partnership](https://fathom.video/share/AkXXeKYAzYuFsmqDG95bVYsAjUqxMLYH?tab=summary&timestamp=1639.0)

## Topics

### SpecterOps Background and Challenges

  - [CMO Bryce Hein joined 4 months ago; company growing quickly and doing category creation](https://fathom.video/share/AkXXeKYAzYuFsmqDG95bVYsAjUqxMLYH?tab=summary&timestamp=149.0)
  - [Strong in long-form technical content for practitioners, but need to improve SEO/discoverability](https://fathom.video/share/AkXXeKYAzYuFsmqDG95bVYsAjUqxMLYH?tab=summary&timestamp=480.0)
  - [Excel at offensive security/red teaming, but deals often close through identity security teams](https://fathom.video/share/AkXXeKYAzYuFsmqDG95bVYsAjUqxMLYH?tab=summary&timestamp=1111.0)
  - [Need to better target and communicate with identity/IAM teams and CISOs](https://fathom.video/share/AkXXeKYAzYuFsmqDG95bVYsAjUqxMLYH?tab=summary&timestamp=1137.0)
  - [Challenge: maintaining technical credibility while expanding content for broader audience](https://fathom.video/share/AkXXeKYAzYuFsmqDG95bVYsAjUqxMLYH?tab=summary&timestamp=1121.0)

### GrowthX's AI-Powered Content Approach

  - [Uses AI to scale quality content creation while keeping human experts in the loop](https://fathom.video/share/AkXXeKYAzYuFsmqDG95bVYsAjUqxMLYH?tab=summary&timestamp=518.0)
  - [Creates detailed artifacts on personas, products, writing guidelines to inform AI systems](https://fathom.video/share/AkXXeKYAzYuFsmqDG95bVYsAjUqxMLYH?tab=summary&timestamp=518.0)
  - [Employs coding agents to build deterministic workflows for research, drafting, and editing](https://fathom.video/share/AkXXeKYAzYuFsmqDG95bVYsAjUqxMLYH?tab=summary&timestamp=518.0)
  - [Fact-checking system verifies content against knowledge bases and trusted sources](https://fathom.video/share/AkXXeKYAzYuFsmqDG95bVYsAjUqxMLYH?tab=summary&timestamp=518.0)
  - [Aims for high-quality, personalized content that can perform well in both search and AI answers](https://fathom.video/share/AkXXeKYAzYuFsmqDG95bVYsAjUqxMLYH?tab=summary&timestamp=518.0)

### Potential Collaboration Strategy

  - [Start with 8-week strategy and execution sprint to prove value and set direction](https://fathom.video/share/AkXXeKYAzYuFsmqDG95bVYsAjUqxMLYH?tab=summary&timestamp=1639.0)
  - [Focus on calibrating AI system to SpecterOps' voice and technical standards](https://fathom.video/share/AkXXeKYAzYuFsmqDG95bVYsAjUqxMLYH?tab=summary&timestamp=1100.0)
  - [Begin with narrower topic focus to establish quality before scaling](https://fathom.video/share/AkXXeKYAzYuFsmqDG95bVYsAjUqxMLYH?tab=summary&timestamp=1567.0)
  - [Conduct 4-6 deep dives with SpecterOps technical experts to build domain knowledge](https://fathom.video/share/AkXXeKYAzYuFsmqDG95bVYsAjUqxMLYH?tab=summary&timestamp=1561.0)
  - [Prioritize content types and topics where AI can meet quality bar initially](https://fathom.video/share/AkXXeKYAzYuFsmqDG95bVYsAjUqxMLYH?tab=summary&timestamp=1567.0)

### Content Distribution and Influence

  - [Build strong owned content engine as foundation before expanding to third-party sites](https://fathom.video/share/AkXXeKYAzYuFsmqDG95bVYsAjUqxMLYH?tab=summary&timestamp=1214.0)
  - [Potential for repurposing content as answers to specific questions on platforms like Reddit](https://fathom.video/share/AkXXeKYAzYuFsmqDG95bVYsAjUqxMLYH?tab=summary&timestamp=1274.0)
  - [Explore targeted outreach to update/improve mentions on relevant third-party sites](https://fathom.video/share/AkXXeKYAzYuFsmqDG95bVYsAjUqxMLYH?tab=summary&timestamp=1346.0)

## Next Steps

  - [GrowthX to follow up with more details on 8-week sprint offering](https://fathom.video/share/AkXXeKYAzYuFsmqDG95bVYsAjUqxMLYH?tab=summary&timestamp=1639.0)
  - [SpecterOps to consider timing and budget for potential engagement](https://fathom.video/share/AkXXeKYAzYuFsmqDG95bVYsAjUqxMLYH?tab=summary&timestamp=1639.0)
  - [Explore creative content ideas, like writing from attacker's perspective for practitioner audience](https://fathom.video/share/AkXXeKYAzYuFsmqDG95bVYsAjUqxMLYH?tab=summary&timestamp=1752.0)
  - [SpecterOps to prioritize persona focus between identity/IAM teams and CISOs for initial efforts](https://fathom.video/share/AkXXeKYAzYuFsmqDG95bVYsAjUqxMLYH?tab=summary&timestamp=1737.0)
